arts.ttl: RB Leipzig’s Assan Ouédraogo undergoes surgery
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have today confirmed that Assan Ouédraogo underwent surgery in Turku, Finland, after suffering a muscular and tendon injury in his left thigh during last weekend’s Champions League match…

arts.ttl: Report suggests possible replacement for Rose at Leipzig
arts.sum: Roger Schmidt is being touted as a possible replacement for Marco Rose at RB Leipzig should the latter lose his job.

arts.ttl: Manchester United show interest in RB Leipzig’s David Raum
arts.sum: Manchester United are interested in RB Leipzig and Germany international David Raum, according to Florian Plettenburg. Under new head coach Ruben Amorim, Manchester United will be taking a close look…

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Transfer Talk Update: Christopher Nkunku, Omar Marmoush, Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's DFB-Pokal predictions including RB Leipzig vs. Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's DFB-Pokal fixtures, including RB Leipzig vs. Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Eintracht Frankfurt preview: Team News and Predicted Lineups
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are faltering in the league currently under the guise of under-pressure coach Marco Rose, whereas Eintracht Frankfurt are heading into Wednesday evening's away tie high off a strong league start.

arts.ttl: Rose insists he remains calm amid Leipzig crisis
arts.sum: Marco Rose is fully aware of the seriousness of the situation at RB Leipzig, who are winless in six games, but insists he remains calm.

arts.ttl: Report: Frankfurt set minimum price for Larsson amid interest from top clubs
arts.sum: It would take an offer of at least €50 million for Eintracht Frankfurt to consider selling Hugo Larsson, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Leipzig hit by new injury blow: Lukeba out for months
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have been rocked by the news that Castelllo Lukeba will be sidelined for months.
